tasks.subject: Task 1: Tipo compartilhado + prompt-template-rules
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Criar UniverseSettingsProps e simplificar prompt-template-rules.ts.

**Files:**
- Create: front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/universe-settings-props.ts
- Modify: front/src/features/image-forge/lib/prompt-template-rules.ts

**Verify:** cd front && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/universe-settings-props.ts", "front/src/features/image-forge/lib/prompt-template-rules.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UniverseSettingsProps com 15 props", "hasBadges só true para pokemon", "funções antigas removidas"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Componentes únicos — Pokemon, LEGO, Casal
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Criar os 3 componentes com layout exclusivo.

**Files:**
- Create: front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/pokemon-settings.tsx
- Create: front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/lego-settings.tsx
- Create: front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/casal-settings.tsx

**Verify:** cd front && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/pokemon-settings.tsx", "front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/lego-settings.tsx", "front/src/features/image-forge/components/settings/universes/casal-settings.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd front && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PokemonSettings tem insígnias", "LegoSettings sem Background", "CasalSettings usa CoupleReferencePanel"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Dispatcher — refatorar settings-step.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Substituir lógica condicional pelo mapa UNIVERSE_SETTINGS.

**Files:**

**Verify:** cd front && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint
